reference: Hello, these symptoms are hormonal. It is too early to know whether you are pregnant or not. Stop stressing yourself. You need to wait another two weeks to take a test. Check your blood sugar and blood pressure. Don't be nervous.
text: Hello, these symptoms are hormonal. If it's too early to know whether you are pregnant or not, stop stressing yourself. You need to wait another 2 weeks to take a test. Check your blood sugar and blood pressure; don't be nervous.
